errors.evidence: FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: 'data/gaia/validation/99c9cc74-fdc8-46c6-8f8d-3ce2d3bfeea3.mp3'
errors.description: The system failed to locate and access the audio file at the specified path, leading to a 'FileNotFoundError' during the execution of the 'inspect_file_as_text' tool. This indicates an issue with the environment's ability to provide the necessary resource.

errors.evidence: LLM's 'Thought': 'The attached file is an audio file (mp3), and our inspect_file_as_text tool does not support audio files.' This directly contradicts the tool's description: 'This tool handles the following file extensions: [... \".mp3\", ...]'.
